allow: PowerShell($root = "c:\\Users\\Rubica\\Documents\\Website Templates\\[0] - Dealer Sites\\dealer-template-1"; $dirs = @\("dist","_dist","build","public",".astro",".vercel",".vercel\\output"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { $p = Join-Path $root $d; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $files = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $p -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in ".html",".json",".js",".css",".txt",".yaml",".yml",".md",".astro" }; foreach \($f in $files\) { try { $t = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f.FullName\); if \($t.Contains\([char]0x2014\) -and $t.Contains\("trusted partner"\)\) { Write-Output $f.FullName } } catch {} } } })

PowerShell($root = "c:\\Users\\Rubica\\Documents\\Website Templates\\[0] - Dealer Sites\\dealer-template-1"; $files = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $root -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules" -and $_.Extension -in ".json",".yaml",".yml",".ts",".tsx",".js",".jsx",".astro",".md",".mdx",".html",".env" }; $hits = @\(\); foreach \($f in $files\) { try { $t = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f.FullName\); if \($t.Contains\([char]0x2014\)\) { $hits += $f.FullName } } catch {} }; Write-Output "Em dash files \(excl node_modules\):"; $hits | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ })

PowerShell($root = "c:\\Users\\Rubica\\Documents\\Website Templates\\[0] - Dealer Sites\\dealer-template-1\\.astro"; if \(Test-Path $root\) { $files = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $root -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($f in $files\) { try { $t = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f.FullName\); if \($t.Contains\([char]0x2014\) -and $t.Contains\("trusted partner"\)\) { Write-Output $f.FullName } } catch {} } } else { Write-Output ".astro missing" })

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('dist/locations/arvada/index.html', 'utf8'\); const matches = html.match\(/<script type=\\"application\\/ld\\+json\\"[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\) || []; console.log\('JSON-LD blocks found:', matches.length\); matches.forEach\(\(m, i\) => { const json = m.replace\(/<script[^>]*>/, ''\).replace\(/<\\/script>/, ''\); try { const obj = JSON.parse\(json\); console.log\(\(i+1\)+'.', obj['@type'] || \(Array.isArray\(obj\) ? 'array' : 'unknown'\), '— @id:', obj['@id'] || '\(none\)'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(\(i+1\)+'. PARSE ERROR:', e.message\); } }\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); for \(const p of ['dist/index.html','dist/about-us/index.html','dist/contact-us/index.html','dist/solutions/index.html','dist/solutions/foundational/website-design/index.html','dist/indoor-billboards/screen-advertising/index.html','dist/privacy/index.html','dist/terms/index.html','dist/404.html']\) { const html = fs.readFileSync\(p, 'utf8'\); const matches = html.match\(/<script type=\\"application\\/ld\\+json\\"[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\) || []; const types = matches.map\(m => { try { return JSON.parse\(m.replace\(/<script[^>]*>/, ''\).replace\(/<\\/script>/, ''\)\)['@type']; } catch { return '?'; } }\); console.log\(p, '->', matches.length, ':', types.join\(', '\)\); }")
